task_completion.description: Verify the agent has logged into Odoo as admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo dashboard or app menu is visible in a web browser, typically showing the admin user profile icon in the top right corner.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent has navigated to the Recruitment application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Recruitment app interface is visible, showing a list of job positions (including 'Experienced Developer') or a Kanban board of applicants.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent has found and opened Sofia Martinez's application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The detailed applicant form view for 'Sofia Martinez' is visible on the screen, and the associated job position is listed as 'Experienced Developer'.

task_completion.description: Verify the application stage has been changed to 'Contract Signed'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status bar or stage indicator at the top right of the applicant's form view shows 'Contract Signed' highlighted as the active/current stage.

task_completion.description: Verify a new employee record was created for Sofia Martinez from the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Create Employee' modal is being filled out, the newly created Employee record view for 'Sofia Martinez' is visible, or an 'Employee' smart button appears at the top of her applicant record indicating the profile was successfully linked.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Odoo web interface rather than terminal commands or API scripts to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Odoo UI with visible clicks, dropdown selections, and form entries, rather than a terminal window executing backend scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard Odoo layout (menus, Kanban boards, form views, status bars) and is not a text editor or a static mockup.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) are not open, and the sequence of screenshots shows a logical progression of UI interactions leading to the final state.
